x-enumeration-literals.name: Periodic Billing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Bill is generated at regular intervals (daily, weekly, monthly).

Comment:
Example:Monthly credit card statement charges.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event-Based Billing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Bill is generated when a specific event occurs.

Comment:
Examples:
Loan processing fee billed upon disbursement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: One-Time Billing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Single bill for a specific service or product.

Comment:
Example: Annual account maintenance fee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: On-Demand Billing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Bills are enerated upon customer request or irregular need.

Comment:
Example:
Copy of past statement requested by customer.
